backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining all data types (courses, users, enrollments, projects, testimonials, etc.) and initializing state maps with authorization and blob storage mixins for the Gelephu Farmers Academy backend.
backend/migration.mo: Minimal migration module with a no-op `run` function that accepts an empty old actor state and returns an empty new state.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping three implemented features (user progress dashboard, farmer testimonials, mobile responsiveness) to their associated source files, components, and test IDs with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated text file containing short summaries of each frontend source file, describing their purpose and notable implementation details.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including colors for background, foreground, charts, and sidebar.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app titled 'Gelephu Farmers Academy' that mounts the app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that defines the `PageView` type union, manages page routing via state, wraps the app in QueryClient and ThemeProvider, and renders Header, Footer, FloatingContactButton, and a conditional ProfileSetupDialog.
frontend/src/components/AccessDeniedScre: Reusable UI component that displays a centered card with a shield icon and configurable message for unauthorized access scenarios.
frontend/src/components/admin/ContentMan: Admin panel card for editing public site content including vision, goals, team members, and news items, with add/remove controls and form submission to update the backend.
frontend/src/components/admin/CourseMana: Admin panel card that lists existing courses in a table and provides a dialog form to create new courses with title, description, instructor, dates, and production type.
frontend/src/components/admin/MetricsMan: Admin component for adding production metrics (hydroponic, nursery, bamboo) via a dialog form that submits to the backend using the useAddProductionMetric hook.
frontend/src/components/admin/ProjectMan: Admin component that lists ongoing and completed projects in a table and provides a dialog form to create new projects with fields like title, description, production type, and dates.
frontend/src/components/admin/SOPManagem: Admin component for full CRUD management of Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs), supporting create, edit, and delete operations with dynamic array fields for procedures, roles, and quality standards.
frontend/src/components/admin/Submission: Admin component that displays all contact form submissions from farmers in a searchable, filterable table with columns for name, contact, location, interest, and date.
frontend/src/components/admin/Testimonia: Admin component for reviewing, approving, and deleting farmer testimonials, organized into pending and approved tabs with counts displayed as badges.
frontend/src/components/admin/UserManage: Admin component that lists all users in a table and allows inline role assignment (admin, user, guest) via a dropdown select for each user.
frontend/src/components/FloatingContactB: Fixed floating action button that expands to reveal WhatsApp and phone call links for the academy's contact number (+975 77421966).
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site footer with branding, two columns of quick navigation links, and contact information including phone and WhatsApp links.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky top navigation header with desktop and mobile menus, Internet Identity auth login/logout, language toggle (English/Dzongkha), and a 'More' dropdown for secondary nav items.
frontend/src/components/pedagogy/Pedagog: Displays the pedagogy framework page with key metrics cards, a hybrid training-production model diagram, course listings, and a download button for the framework document. Uses `usePedagogyData` for data and shows skeletons while loading.
frontend/src/components/pedagogy/PitchDe: Renders a multi-slide pitch deck for the Training+Production Hybrid Model, navigable with prev/next buttons, showing metrics, production data, and program details sourced from `usePedagogyData`.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupDial: Modal dialog that collects a new authenticated user's name, email, and bio to create their initial UserProfile on first login.
frontend/src/components/TestimonialSubmi: Dialog for authenticated users to submit a farmer testimonial (name, location, farming area, text), showing a login prompt if unauthenticated and a success state after submission.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates all dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an `InternetIdentityProvider` context and `useInternetIdentity` hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and persisted identity state via `AuthClient`.
frontend/src/hooks/useLanguage.ts: Implements a simple bilingual (English/Dzongkha) language hook with a shared global state, session storage persistence, and a `t()` translation function keyed by string identifiers.
frontend/src/hooks/usePedagogyData.ts: Aggregates courses, projects by type, production metrics, and enrollments from multiple queries into a single `PedagogyMetrics` object, exposing a unified loading state for pedagogy-related UI.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for backend interactions including user profiles, courses, enrollments, testimonials, projects, and metrics—wrapping actor calls with loading states, cache invalidation, and toast notifications.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens (backgrounds, foregrounds, primary, sidebar, charts, etc.).
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider, then mounts it to the DOM.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPage.tsx: Admin dashboard page that verifies the caller is an admin via the actor, then renders tabbed management sections (Users, Courses, Projects, Metrics, Content, SOPs, Submissions, Testimonials) with a mobile dropdown fallback.
frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx: Contact/registration page with a form (name, contact details, location, interests) that submits via a mutation hook, and shows a success screen with phone/WhatsApp links on completion.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Production dashboard page that fetches and displays hydroponic, nursery, and bamboo metrics in tabbed cards, requiring authentication to access.
frontend/src/pages/FAQPage.tsx: FAQ page that renders a list of common questions and answers in an accordion component, with a hero section and contact call-to-action links.
frontend/src/pages/GDPDashboardPage.tsx: GDP impact dashboard page that displays key agricultural metrics (yield improvements, trained farmers, revenue, GDP progress), milestone tracking, and impact area cards aligned with Bhutan's 10x GDP growth goal.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: The main landing page displaying a hero section, feature cards, stats, success stories carousel, and recent testimonials, with navigation to other pages via the onNavigate prop.
frontend/src/pages/MyProgressPage.tsx: An authenticated user dashboard showing enrolled courses, learning progress bars, achievements, and a button to increment progress; redirects unauthenticated users to an access-denied screen.
frontend/src/pages/NewsPage.tsx: A static news/articles page listing seasonal farming tips and guides with expand/collapse functionality, category badges, and formatted dates.
frontend/src/pages/PedagogyPage.tsx: Displays the Gelephu Farmers Academy's sellable pedagogy framework and pitch deck in a tabbed layout, with a hero image, introductory text, and a contact call-to-action section.
frontend/src/pages/ProjectsPage.tsx: Shows academy projects organized into tabs for ongoing, completed, and hydroponic-specific projects, fetched via query hooks and rendered as cards with type badges, dates, and outcomes.
frontend/src/pages/SOPsPage.tsx: Displays Standard Operating Procedures organized by production type (hydroponic, nursery, bamboo) in tabs, with accordion sections for procedures, roles, and safety guidelines. Requires authentication via Internet Identity to access.
frontend/src/pages/StorePage.tsx: A courseware store page that lists agricultural educational products with pricing and inventory, allowing authenticated users to purchase items with quantity selection via a confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/pages/TechniquesPage.tsx: Displays a searchable grid of farming techniques (with fallback static data if backend returns none), each shown as a card with title, description, and benefits.
frontend/src/pages/TestimonialsPage.tsx: Shows approved farmer testimonials in a grid layout with a hero section, and allows authenticated or unauthenticated users to submit their own story via a dialog.
frontend/src/pages/TrainingPage.tsx: Renders a training hub with course listings, enrollment functionality, downloadable PDF resources, and success stories, supporting authenticated enrollment via Internet Identity.
frontend/src/utils/documentExport.ts: Defines a `generateFrameworkDocument` function that produces a formatted plain-text export of the Gelephu Farmers Academy's hybrid pedagogy framework, incorporating live metrics, course, and project data.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage fallback for values like admin tokens.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with OKLCH-based design tokens, custom border radii, accordion animations, sidebar colors, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the current state of the Gelephu Farmers Academy project, listing existing features (user accounts, testimonials, mobile responsiveness) and pending feature requests with their implementation status.
